title: Akeso/Summit Ivonescimab Shows 34% OS Improvement in Lung Cancer
headline: Akeso's bispecific antibody ivonescimab plus chemotherapy delivered a 34% improvement in overall survival in the Harmoni-6 trial in China, exceeding expectations but drawing scrutiny on detailed data.
key_facts: 34% overall survival improvement; Harmoni-6 trial; China-based lung cancer study; ivonescimab (PD-1/VEGF bispecific) plus chemotherapy

title: Revolution Medicines Pancreatic Cancer Data Called 'Unprecedented'
headline: Revolution Medicines presented ASCO data in pancreatic cancer described as 'unprecedented' and pointing to a paradigm shift in a historically intractable tumor type.
key_facts: ASCO 2026 presentation; pancreatic cancer; described as 'unprecedented' breakthrough; RAS-targeting therapy; competing against other RAS inhibitor programs

title: Pfizer-Innovent $10.5B China Cancer Drug Partnership
headline: Pfizer and Innovent Biologics struck a deal worth up to $10.5 billion covering up to 12 antibody cancer drug programs in the latest mega-deal for China-originated assets.
key_facts: $10.5 billion deal value; up to 12 antibody cancer programs; announced May 28, 2026; sixth China-originated drug partnership since July 2025 worth $8B+ total

title: Merck Positions 'Cornerstone' Cancer Drug at ASCO
headline: At ASCO 2026, Merck makes the case for what it calls a 'cornerstone' cancer drug with new clinical positioning data.
key_facts: ASCO 2026 presentation; described as 'cornerstone' cancer therapy; specific drug name and data not accessible

title: Lilly Retevmo Expansion Into 'Final Chapter' at ASCO
headline: Eli Lilly presents ASCO data teeing up expansion for Retevmo (selpercatinib), its RET inhibitor, described as the drug's 'final chapter' of label expansion.
key_facts: ASCO 2026 presentation; Retevmo (selpercatinib) RET inhibitor; label expansion data; RET-targeted cancer therapy

title: J&J Erleada vs. Pfizer in Prostate Cancer One-Upmanship
headline: J&J positions Erleada (apalutamide) to shake up prostate cancer care at ASCO, but Pfizer presented data that 'one-ups J&J' in the same therapeutic space.
key_facts: ASCO 2026 presentations; J&J Erleada (apalutamide) May 31 data; Pfizer prostate cancer data May 30; competitive positioning in prostate cancer

title: Incyte Monjuvi Combo for First-Line DLBCL Expansion
headline: Incyte presents ASCO data positioning its Monjuvi (tafasitamab) combination for first-line diffuse large B-cell lymphoma, expanding from relapsed/refractory indication.
key_facts: ASCO 2026 presentation; Monjuvi (tafasitamab); first-line DLBCL indication; label expansion from relapsed/refractory setting

title: BMS Unveils Next-Generation Blood Cancer Drug Data
headline: Bristol Myers Squibb unveils data for one of its next-generation blood cancer drugs at ASCO 2026.
key_facts: ASCO 2026 presentation; next-generation blood cancer therapeutic; specific drug name and data not accessible

title: GSK/Ionis Bepirovirsen Called 'Historic' Functional Cure for HBV
headline: GSK and Ionis' bepirovirsen data for hepatitis B is called a 'historic moment' and 'functional cure' with clear blockbuster potential by analysts.
key_facts: Bepirovirsen hepatitis B therapy; described as 'functional cure'; 'historic moment' designation; blockbuster potential forecast

title: Replimune Takes Third FDA Approval Attempt for Oncolytic Therapy
headline: Replimune takes a third swing at gaining FDA approval for its oncolytic immunotherapy following 'productive' FDA interactions.
key_facts: Third FDA approval attempt; oncolytic immunotherapy; 'productive' pre-submission meetings with FDA

title: MannKind Afrezza FDA Approval for Pediatric Expansion
headline: FDA signs off on pediatric expansion for MannKind's Afrezza, extending the inhaled insulin therapy to younger patients.
key_facts: Afrezza (inhaled insulin); pediatric indication approval; May 29, 2026

title: Tremfya, Venclyxto Secure Label Expansions
headline: Tremfya and Venclyxto receive FDA label expansions, broadening their approved indications.
key_facts: Tremfya label expansion; Venclyxto label expansion; May 29, 2026; specific indications not detailed

title: Lilly Acquires Three Vaccine Biotechs for Up to $3.8B
headline: Eli Lilly announced acquisition of three vaccine biotechs for up to $3.8 billion total to expand its vaccine pipeline.
key_facts: Up to $3.8 billion acquisition value; three vaccine biotechs; announced May 26, 2026

title: CVS Obesity Drug Deal Puts Lilly on Par with Novo Nordisk
headline: CVS obesity drug deal restores Lilly Zepbound coverage and advances Foundayo pill, putting Lilly on equal footing with Novo Nordisk in obesity market.
key_facts: CVS partnership; Lilly Foundayo (tirzepatide oral); Zepbound coverage restoration; competitive parity with Novo Nordisk obesity portfolio

title: Allogene CEO David Chang Steps Down After 8 Years
headline: David Chang, CEO of Allogene Therapeutics, is stepping down after eight years leading the CAR-T cell therapy company.
key_facts: CEO David Chang resignation; 8-year tenure; Allogene Therapeutics

title: Agios Drug Fails Key Clinical Test
headline: Agios Pharmaceuticals' drug program fails a key clinical trial endpoint, impacting pipeline progress.
key_facts: Clinical trial failure; specific drug and indication not specified

title: Experts: Grail Cancer Blood Test Still Not Ready for Broad Use
headline: Experts say Grail's Galleri cancer detection blood test is still not ready for widespread clinical adoption despite technological promise.
key_facts: Grail Galleri blood test; expert consensus on premature widespread adoption; May 30, 2026
